title: Executive Vision
summary: DeltaCore augments existing telemetry providers rather than replacing them.

blocks.heading: Vision statement
blocks.content: DeltaCore is an industrial intelligence platform that augments existing mining, fleet and telemetry systems by transforming operational data into actionable insights. DeltaCore enhances providers such as PetroMan, AVA and Dingo rather than replacing them.

blocks.heading: Product goals
bullets: Reduce operating costs through fuel optimization and loss prevention
Detect fuel theft, anomalies and abnormal consumption
Increase equipment uptime via predictive maintenance insights
Improve operator performance through scoring and benchmarking
Provide enterprise dashboards, reporting and real-time alerting

blocks.heading: Value proposition
blocks.content: PetroMan and similar systems collect data. DeltaCore provides intelligence — forecasting, anomaly detection, optimization and fleet-wide insights delivered as an enhancement layer through APIs and dashboards.
